features.name: User Authentication System

features.name: Survey Management System

features.name: Company Management System
features.description: Multi-tenant company management with user assignments and survey distribution

features.name: User Management System
features.description: User CRUD operations with company assignments and survey access management

features.name: Survey Results System

features.name: Survey Assignment System
features.description: Automated survey assignment to users based on company membership and manual assignments

features.name: Survey Session Management
features.description: Survey session tracking, cooldown management, and access control

features.name: Email Service Integration
features.description: Mailgun integration for OTP delivery and notification emails

features.name: SMS Service Integration

features.name: Database Layer
features.description: Drizzle ORM configuration with MySQL database schema and query management

features.name: Admin Dashboard
features.description: Administrative interface for managing surveys, users, companies, and viewing analytics

features.description: User-facing survey interface with SurveyJS integration and multilingual support

features.name: Validation and Error Handling
